name: Local Semantic Memory
description: Self-contained local semantic memory plugin package with bundled skill files, local indexing runtime, and default profile config.

workspaceRoot.description: Workspace root used by the local semantic memory runtime when no explicit environment override is provided.

ollamaHost.description: Base URL for the Ollama instance used for embeddings.

defaultEmbedModel.description: Default embedding model name for the local memory runtime.

profilesPath.description: Optional path to a custom profiles JSON file.
